name: huggingface-tools
description: HuggingFace local helpers — import CLI token, run DuckDB SQL over dataset parquet
author: zorai

default_dataset_workdir.label: Dataset workdir
default_dataset_workdir.description: Cache directory for downloaded parquet files

hf_token_file.label: HF CLI token file
hf_token_file.description: Override the location of the huggingface-cli token file

auth-import.description: Print the on-disk HF CLI token for pasting into the huggingface plugin settings

auth-whoami.description: Show the HF identity associated with the on-disk token

query.description: Run DuckDB SQL over a HuggingFace dataset's parquet files

query-schema.description: Show the parquet schema for a HuggingFace dataset split
